name: Roadway AI
description: Send browser events (identify, group, track, etc.) to your RoadwayAI workspace.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.description: Your RoadwayAI API key for authentication

enable_batching.label: Batch Data to RoadwayAI
enable_batching.description: When enabled, the action will use the RoadwayAI batch API.

group_name.label: Group Name
group_name.description: Name of the group where user belongs to

timestamp.label: Event Timestamp
timestamp.description: The time the event occurred in UTC

enable_batching.label: Batch Data to RoadwayAI
enable_batching.description: When enabled, the action will use the RoadwayAI batch API.

user_id.label: User ID
user_id.description: The distinct ID after calling identify.

anonymous_id.label: Anonymous ID
anonymous_id.description: A distinct ID randomly generated prior to calling identify.

group_id.label: Group ID
group_id.description: The unique identifier of the group that performed this event.

insert_id.label: Insert ID
insert_id.description: A random id that is unique to an event.

event_properties.label: Event Properties
event_properties.description: An object of key-value pairs that represent additional data to be sent along with the event.

context.label: Event Context
context.description: An object of key-value pairs that provides useful context about the event.

event.label: Event Name
event.description: The name of the action being performed.

name.label: Event Original Name
name.description: The Event Original Name, if applicable

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

app_version.label: App Version
app_version.description: The current version of your application.

country.label: Country
country.description: The current country of the user.

region.label: Region
region.description: The current region of the user.

language.label: Language
language.description: The language set by the user.

page_properties.label: Page Properties
page_properties.description: Web page context and navigation information

url.label: URL
url.description: The full URL of the webpage on which the event is triggered.

utm_properties.label: UTM Properties
utm_properties.description: UTM tracking and campaign attribution properties

identifyUser.title: Identify User
identifyUser.description: Set the user ID for a particular device ID or update user properties.

enable_batching.label: Batch Data to RoadwayAI
enable_batching.description: When enabled, the action will use the RoadwayAI batch API.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: A timestamp of when the event took place. Default is current date and time.

ip.label: IP Address
ip.description: The IP address of the user. This is only used for geolocation and won't be stored.

user_id.label: User ID
user_id.description: The unique user identifier set by you

anonymous_id.label: Anonymous ID
anonymous_id.description: The generated anonymous ID for the user

traits.label: User Properties
traits.description: Properties to set on the user profile

trackPageView.title: Track Page View
trackPageView.description: Forward page view event to RoadwayAI.

enable_batching.label: Batch Data to RoadwayAI
enable_batching.description: When enabled, the action will use the RoadwayAI batch API.

utm_properties.label: UTM Properties
utm_properties.description: UTM tracking and campaign attribution properties

id.label: Person ID
id.description: The ID used to uniquely identify a person in RoadwayAI.

anonymous_id.label: Anonymous ID
anonymous_id.description: An anonymous ID for when no Person ID exists.

event_id.label: Event ID
event_id.description: An optional identifier used to deduplicate events.

url.label: Page URL
url.description: The URL of the page visited.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: A timestamp of when the event took place. Default is current date and time.

data.label: Event Attributes
data.description: Optional data to include with the event.
